quicksight.dashboard.histogramvisual.Cfn:
A histogram.

For more information, see [Using histograms](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/histogram-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.dashboard.histogramvisual.Act.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.histogramvisual.Sub.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.histogramvisual.Tit.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.histogramvisual.Vis.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
